philippines.title: Indonesia issues new summons for Google, Meta over teen social media ban
philippines.description:
JAKARTA, Indonesia — Indonesia issued a second round of summons letters on Thursday to Google and Meta for allegedly flouting a days-old ban on social media access for under-16s. The Communication and Digital Ministry said it had “issued a second summons letter to Google (YouTube) and Meta (Facebook, Instagram, Threads) after both parties failed to comply” and warned of “sanctions”. READ: Indonesia enforces social media ban for children under 16 App-addicted Indonesia began enforcing a social media ban for users under the age of 16 on Saturday, citing threats from online pornography, cyberbullying and internet addiction. The ministry said Thursday […]...
Keep on reading: Indonesia issues new summons for Google, Meta over teen social media ban

philippines.title: April 2026 K-dramas: From ‘Perfect Crown’ to ‘Yumi’s Cells’ Season 3
philippines.description:
The K-drama lineup for April 2026 is as intense as the heat in the Philippines, covering power struggles within a modern-day royal family, uncovering the mystery behind an illegal boxing syndicate, and navigating the toughest parts of office politics.  This time, it’s IU, Byeon Woo-seok, Kim Go-eun, and Kim Hyang-gi taking center stage. Many fans know what they’re capable of in their past work, and since their latest work shows them as different characters, it’s interesting to see how they’ll pull them off. From dealing with chaebol drama to coming to terms with one’s emotions, here’s a look at the […]...
Keep on reading: April 2026 K-dramas: From ‘Perfect Crown’ to ‘Yumi’s Cells’ Season 3

philippines.title: US stocks join global selloff as oil prices jump again
philippines.description:
NEW YORK — Wall Street stocks tumbled early Thursday on the latest jump in oil prices as tough rhetoric between the United States and Iran lessened hopes of a Middle East war resolution. About 30 minutes into trading, the Dow Jones Industrial Average was down 1.0 percent at 46,108.16. The broad-based S&P 500 fell 0.9 percent to 6,516.01, while the tech-rich Nasdaq Composite Index shed 1.3 percent to 21,556.30. US stocks had risen the last two days after Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian appeared to open the door to a ceasefire, while US President Donald Trump scheduled an address to the […]...
Keep on reading: US stocks join global selloff as oil prices jump again

philippines.title: Gilas 3×3 outlasts Thailand to reach FIBA Asia Cup main draw
philippines.description: The quartet of Jerrick Ahanmisi, Ralph Cu, Chris Koon, and Sean Alter eliminate reigning SEA Games 3x3 champions Thailand to advance to the next round of the FIBA 3x3 Asia Cup

philippines.title: Leo, the first US pope, emerges as pointed Trump critic
philippines.description: Chicago Cardinal Blase Cupich, a close ally of Pope Leo, says the pope was taking up the mantle of a long line of pontiffs who have urged world leaders to turn away from war

philippines.title: On Maundy Thursday, Cebu archbishop links faith and service
philippines.description: ‘Jesus showed that true love kneels. True love serves. True love is not afraid to get its hands dirty,’ Cebu Archbishop Alberto Uy says on Maundy Thursday

tech.title: Family offices stall deal-making during Iran conflict

tech.title: Tesla reports 358,000 first-quarter vehicle deliveries, down 14% from last quarter
tech.description: Tesla is coming off a year of declining deliveries due in part to increased competition from rivals in China offering lower-cost models.
